title: What do you think of this humanctl loop?
summary: Published via CLI and linked to a fresh artifact so the app can ask for feedback inside humanctl itself.
prompt: What do you think of this first real artifact-plus-ask loop?
whyNow: This is the first point where humanctl can show an artifact and capture your answer without hand-editing the workspace.
ifIgnored: We keep building from assumptions instead of validating the actual interrupt-and-response loop.

options.label: Yes, this wedge is right
options.description: Keep pushing asks, artifacts, and notification policy on top of this loop.

options.label: Tighten the surface first
options.description: Polish the ask and artifact experience before adding more channels.

options.label: Change the shape
options.description: The loop is close, but the interaction model needs a sharper rethink.
